name: Kashmiri Rogan Josh
keywords: indian ethnic easy entertain main dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the fennel seeds until fine.
2. Put the yoghurt in a bowl and beat it with a fork until smooth and creamy.
3. Heat the oil in a large pot over high heat. When hot, add the cinnamon and cloves.
4. Add the ground asafetida when the oil is hot.
5. Add all the meat and salt to the pot. Stir and cook on high heat for about 5 minutes.
6. Add the paprika and cayenne pepper, stirring well.
7. Gradually add the yoghurt, a little at a time, while stirring vigorously.
8. Continue cooking until all liquid has boiled away and the meat is lightly browned.
9. Stir in the fennel seeds and ginger.
10. Add water or beef broth, cover with a slightly ajar lid, and cook on medium heat for 30 minutes.
11. Cover completely and cook on low heat for another 45 minutes or until the meat is tender.
12. Stir in the garam masala to achieve a thick, reddish-brown sauce. If needed, boil off excess liquid.
